revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:浜脇温泉]]
'''Hamawaki Onsen''' (浜脇温泉) is a municipally-operated {{ill|communal onsen|ja|共同温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/communal onsen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 共同浴場|1=Communal hot springs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11392653}} located in {{ill|Beppu|en|Beppu|qid=Q273880|lt=Beppu|1=Beppu}}, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}, in the Hamawaki district.
{{otheruses|municipally-operated communal onsen in Beppu|Hamawaki Onsen, one of the Beppu Hatto|Beppu Onsen}} {{Maplink2|zoom=14|frame=yes|frame-align=right|frame-width=280|frame-height=250|frame-latitude=33.2735|frame-longitude=131.505 |type=point|coord={{Coord|33|16|11.9|N|131|30|32.9|E}}|marker=1 |type2=point|coord2={{Coord|33|16|47.21|N|131|30|0.84|E}}|marker2=4 |type3=point|coord3={{Coord|33|16|4.04|N|131|30|38.34|E}}|marker3=3 |type4=point|coord4={{Coord|33|16|38.82|N|131|30|21.54|E}}|marker4=2 |text='''1.''' '''Hamawaki Onsen'''、'''2.'''{{ill|Takegawara Onsen|ja|竹瓦温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takegawara Onsen|1=Takegawara Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11599290}}、'''3.'''{{ill|Higashi-Beppu Station|en|Higashi-Beppu Station|qid=Q5359632|lt=Higashi-Beppu Station|1=Higashi-Beppu Station}}、'''4.'''{{ill|Beppu Station|en|Beppu Station|qid=Q4890935|lt=Beppu Station (Ōita)|1=Beppu Station}} }}
== Overview == Hamawaki Onsen is located at the center of the {{ill|Hamawaki Onsen District|ja|別府温泉#浜脇温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamawaki Onsen District|1=Beppu Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4890932}}, one of the {{ill|Beppu Hatto|ja|別府八湯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Hatto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 別府温泉|1=Beppu Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4890932}}, and is operated by the city of Beppu. It is housed in a section of a shopping mall complex that was built as part of a southern district redevelopment project in {{ill|1991|en|1991|qid=Q2062|lt=1991|1=1991}} (Heisei 3). The first floor serves as a standard communal bathhouse, and the second floor hosts a multi-purpose hot spring wellness facility called '''Yutopia Hamawaki''' (湯都ピア浜脇), focused on health maintenance.
Historically, Hamawaki was home to the East Onsen (Higashi no Yu / Genzuki-sen) and West Onsen (Nishi no Yu / Seikasen), both used since ancient times for {{ill|toji (hot spring therapy)|ja|湯治|1=Thermal bath|2=ja|3=湯治|4=zh|5=湯治|6=ca|7=Termalisme|8=de|9=Thermalbad|10=es|11=Termalismo|13=Thermal bath|14=eo|15=Varmfonta banejo|16=fr|17=Thermalisme|18=la|19=Balneum thermale|20=lb|21=Thermalbad|22=hu|23=Termálfürdő|24=nl|25=Thermaalbad|26=pt|27=Turismo termal|1=Thermal bath|2=ja|3=湯治|4=zh|5=湯治|6=ca|7=Termalisme|8=de|9=Thermalbad|10=es|11=Termalismo|13=Thermal bath|14=eo|15=Varmfonta banejo|16=fr|17=Thermalisme|18=la|19=Balneum thermale|20=lb|21=Thermalbad|22=hu|23=Termálfürdő|24=nl|25=Thermaalbad|26=pt|27=Turismo termal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/toji (hot spring therapy)|13=User:Immanuelle/Thermal bath|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1004887}}. In {{ill|1928|en|1928|qid=Q19715|lt=1928|1=1928}} (Shōwa 3), the two were consolidated into the Hamawaki Onsen and Hamawaki Kōtō Onsen. These buildings featured reinforced concrete Western-style architecture, similar to the {{ill|Beppu Public Hall|ja|別府市公会堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Public Hall|1=Beppu Public Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18339233}} built the same year. Due to aging, they were demolished in {{ill|1988|en|1988|qid=Q2426|lt=1988|1=1988}} (Shōwa 63).
The current Hamawaki Onsen stands in the redeveloped area of the original site and its surroundings. The central plaza of the shopping mall marks the original onsen location. The tiled plaza reproduces the building’s former layout, and the archway entrance of the old onsen has been reconstructed at the plaza's entrance.
=== Business Hours === * '''Hamawaki Onsen''': 6:30 – 25:00 *: Closed: Unscheduled end-of-year cleaning days * '''Yutopia Hamawaki''': 10:00 – 22:00 *: Closed: Every Tuesday
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple Onsen|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Onsen|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}}
== Location == * 1-8-20 Hamawaki, Beppu-shi, Ōita-ken
== Access == * 20 minutes on foot from {{ill|Beppu Station|en|Beppu Station|qid=Q4890935|lt=Beppu Station (Ōita)|1=Beppu Station}}
=== See also === * {{ill|Beppu Hatto Onsen Meguri|ja|別府八湯温泉道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Hatto Onsen Meguri|1=Beppu Hatto Onsen Road|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396699}}
== External Links == * [http://www.city.beppu.oita.jp/01onsen/02shiei/01hamawaki/hamawaki.html 1. Hamawaki Onsen] - Beppu City website * [http://www.city.beppu.oita.jp/01onsen/02shiei/02yu-topia/yutpa.html 2. Yutopia Hamawaki] - Beppu City website * [http://www.beppers.com/digital_archives/data/503.html "Beppu Onsen Toji Encyclopedia" - Hamawaki Onsen] - Near Future Information Technology Research Association Digital Archives
{{Coord|33|16|11.9|N|131|30|32.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} {{Pref-stub|pref=Ōita Prefecture}} {{Onsen-stub}} {{translated page|ja|浜脇温泉|version=89229341|comment=Imported full ja history}}
